entity.summary: Cross-chain decentralized perpetual exchange providing leveraged crypto trading, multi-asset liquidity pools, swaps, staking, and on-chain collateral and trade transparency across supported networks.
entity.notes: HEI models the Fulcrom AMM discovery row under one Fulcrom exchange entity. First-party documentation describes Fulcrom as a decentralized perpetual exchange across Cronos, zkSync Era, and Cronos zkEVM with leverage trading, on-chain collateral, FLP liquidity, swap fees, and staking functions.

evidence.title: Fulcrom Finance documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Fulcrom as a cross-chain decentralized perpetual exchange and describes leverage trading, on-chain collateral transparency, and its multi-asset liquidity pool model.

evidence.title: Fulcrom official trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform exposes live Trade, Earn, Dashboard, perpetual-market, liquidity-pool, swap, referral, staking, and vesting surfaces.

evidence.title: Fulcrom Trading Module documentation
evidence.notes: First-party trading-module documentation covers perpetual position execution, order handling, leverage, collateral, fees, and related exchange mechanics.
